entities.name: Voice transformation validation
entities.context: Validation system for verifying voice preferences are correctly applied to communications

entities.name: Voice system
entities.context: System for applying V's voice preferences to generated communications, files stored in N5/prefs/communication/

entities.name: Folder state system
entities.context: Workflow tracking using state tags [P] (Processing) and [R] (Ready) for meeting folders

entities.name: Communications generation
entities.context: Process for generating meeting follow-up communications with voice system integration

entities.name: Retry logic
entities.context: Error handling approach with 3 attempts and 30-second waits before escalation

entities.name: Intelligence blocks
entities.context: Content blocks that should remain accessible even when communications generation fails

entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's personal knowledge/automation system that stores voice preferences and communication configs

entities.name: Meeting processing workflow
entities.context: Pipeline that processes meetings through states from Inbox to Ready for deployment

relationships.context: Communications must pass through voice transformation validation
Voice system files stored in N5/prefs/communication/
State transitions from [P] to [R] occur after successful communications generation
Retry logic handles failures in communications generation process
Intelligence blocks must remain accessible even if communications generation fails
